home.description: AltVision automatically generates precise alt text for your images by analyzing both the image and its surrounding context. The plugin considers headings, paragraphs, and captions near the image to create highly relevant descriptions. Stop spending hours writing manual descriptions – let AI do the heavy lifting!

wordpress.title: WordPress Plugin Features
wordpress.oneClick: One-click Generation: Generate intelligent alt text instantly
wordpress.wpReady: WordPress Ready: Seamless WordPress and Gutenberg integration
wordpress.formatSupport: Format Support: Works with JPG, PNG, WebP, and more

chrome.title: Chrome Extension Features
chrome.altTextDetection: Alt Text Detection: Find and highlight images that need attention
chrome.contextAware: Context-Aware: Create descriptive and accurate alternative texts using state-of-the-art AI
chrome.multipleLanguages: Multiple Languages: Available in English and Swedish
